title: Providers list shows a clear empty state
description: Black-box smoke for `orca providers` when no providers are configured anywhere.
input: Run `orca providers` in an isolated empty ORCA_HOME and verify the command shows the empty-state guidance instead of crashing.
command: bash -lc 'REPO_ROOT=${PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}; cd "$REPO_ROOT"; bash agent-eval/scripts/prepare-fast-gate.sh >/dev/null; TMP_ROOT=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf $TMP_ROOT" EXIT; mkdir -p "$TMP_ROOT/home"; env -i PATH="$PATH" HOME="$TMP_ROOT/home" ORCA_HOME="$TMP_ROOT/home/.orca" node dist/bin/orca.js providers'
